label: Ford Mustang Mach-E / F-150 Lightning / E-Transit

ecu.notes: Mach-E BECM uses standard 11-bit ISO-15765 against header 0x7E4. Several DIDs known via FORScan / FDRS but no consolidated public byte-level table.

fields.notes: Reported by community FORScan profiles for Mach-E. Verify against your BECM build. Raw uint16 / 500.

unavailable_fields.soh_pack_voltage_pack_current_per_cell_f: Most decoded fields ship inside FDRS / FORScan databases, not in any open-source repository. Field not documented at byte-level in any open public source.
